face.structure: oval with strong jawline, high cheekbones, and a sharply defined chin

eyes.shape: sharp almond shape with slightly upward tilt
eyes.expression_effect: piercing, discerning look with an intensity that suggests constant analysis

face.expression: pensive and assessing, with a slight furrow of the brows

skin.texture: smooth with subtle freckles across nose
skin.rendering_notes: soft gradient shading to highlight cheekbones and jawline

hair.style: long and straight, with a side parting
hair.flow: smooth cascading locks that fall elegantly over shoulders
details: under subtle lighting, a blue sheen appears

character.aura: an intense, focused presence surrounded by a sense of quiet determination

outfit.base: structured, fitted blazer with sleek, modern lines
outfit.design: solid charcoal gray with subtle pinstripes

composition.framing: medium shot focusing from the waist up
composition.pose: standing sideways with a slight turn towards the camera
composition.gesture: right hand clasping left wrist, conveying a thoughtful and calculating demeanor

background.details: hints of skyscrapers and blurred motion of city lights
background.rules: background is slightly out of focus to highlight character
